$comment: Diffract universal tool registry. Each entry defines a third-party CLI the agent can use. The INSTALL fields (repo/ref/kind/build/entry/bin) are consumed at image-build time by install-diffract-tools.sh to bake the tool into /sandbox/.diffract-tools/<name> and put <bin> on the agent PATH. The CONNECT fields (secretEnv/configEnv/apiHosts/authHeader) describe how to wire the tool's credentials securely at runtime via diffract-tool-connect.sh (OpenShell generic provider -> placeholder in sandbox -> real secret injected at egress). Add a tool = add an entry here; no Dockerfile edit.
